name: mla_qk_rope_decode
goal: Optimize solution.py against SGLang's apply_rope_with_cos_sin_cache_inplace baseline for Kimi-K2.7 MLA q/k RoPE decode; beat every token workload while preserving the exact SGLang interface and matching both outputs.

baseline.measure: reference.py timed by the harness CUPTI runtime (median device-kernel us)
